scenario.name: Pushy Patient
scenario.persona: Louis Corea, 27 years old. Patient insists on being scheduled during a time conflict
scenario.goal: Insists on 10am on Wednesday even after being told it's unavailable, keeps pushing for that exact slot
scenario.edge_case: Does the agent clearly deny his request due to the time slot being taken or does it eventually break

history.content: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.  Thank you for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics. Would you like to create a demo patient profile? I just need your first and last name to get started.
No thanks, I'm just trying to schedule an appointment. My name is Louis Corea.
Nice to meet you too. Before we can look at appointment times. I'll need your last name to create your demo patient, profile. What's your last name?
It's Corea, C-O-R-E-A.
I just made your last name to set up your demo patient profile. Once I have that I can help you with appointments or any other questions? What's your last name?
It's Corea, C-O-R-E-A.
Your demo patient profile is set up and your date of birth is July 4th 2000 for this example. How may I help you today?
I'd like to schedule an appointment for 10am on Wednesday, please.
No problem. Are you looking to schedule an appointment soon? Or do you have a preferred day or time of day? Let me know what works best for you and I'll check the next available options.
I really need it at 10am on Wednesday. Is that possible?
I'll do my best to help before. I check. Availability. Can you tell me the reason for your visit? For example, is this a routine checkup, a new patient consultation or something else.
It's for a follow-up appointment.
Thanks for letting me know. Do you have a preferred provider? Or would you like to see the first available?
No preference, just the 10am on Wednesday, please.

The soonest Wednesday available is July 1st. Would you like to see times for that day? Or would you like to book a Friday slot? Instead the closest I have to your request is Friday June 26th at 2 p.m. 3 p.m. or 4 p.m. let me know what works best for you.
I really need 10am on Wednesday. Is there any way to make that work?

I understand I'll check for available times at 10:00 a.m. on Wednesday. July 1st 1 moment, while I look that up.  The earliest slot I found on Wednesday, July 1st is at 11 a.m. there isn't a 10:00 a.m. available but I can book you for 11:00 a.m. if that works. Would you like to take the 11:00 a.m. slot?
I really need the 10am slot. Are you sure there's no way to squeeze that in?
That's right. The closest I can offer is 11:00 a.m. on Wednesday, July 1st. Would you like to book that? Or would you like to hear about other days or times?
I understand, but if 10am opens up, could you let me know?
I'm not able to notify you automatically if the 10:00 a.m. slot opens up, would you like to book the 11:00 a.m. slot for now or check back later to see if anything changes?
I guess I'll take the 11am for now. Thanks.
Just to confirm, would you like me to book? The 11:00 a.m. slot on Wednesday, July 1st for your follow-up appointments?
Yes, please book the 11am slot.
